mapper.insert: insert into ygt_archive_cursor (ygt_ac_corp_id, ygt_ac_chat_id, ygt_ac_last_seq, ygt_ac_last_pull_status, ygt_ac_last_error, ygt_ac_last_pull_time, ygt_ac_last_success_time, ygt_ac_create_time, ygt_ac_update_time) values (#{ygtAcCorpId}, #{ygtAcChatId}, #{ygtAcLastSeq}, #{ygtAcLastPullStatus}, #{ygtAcLastError}, #{ygtAcLastPullTime}, #{ygtAcLastSuccessTime}, #{ygtAcCreateTime}, #{ygtAcUpdateTime})
mapper.delete: delete from ygt_archive_cursor where ygt_archive_cursor_id in #{id}
